privileged_info_summary: Task involves a synthetic XML portfolio file created in setup_task.sh with 6 total transactions: 2 NVDA (ISIN US67066G1040), 2 AMD (ISIN US0079031078), and 2 BND (ISIN US9219378356). All 4 tech stock transactions (NVDA and AMD) are initially misplaced in the 'Retirement Savings' portfolio and must be moved to 'Speculative Tech', while the 2 bond transactions must remain in 'Retirement Savings'. Verifier checks for correct transaction locations and preservation of all 6 transactions.
